items.title: Xi asks Trump if U.S. and China can avoid 'Thucydides Trap' at high-stakes summit
items.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump met Chinese President Xi Jinping in Beijing on Thursday morning for the start of a high-stakes summit that runs through Friday.

items.title: In photos: Trump kicks off high-stakes summit with Xi
items.summary: The high-stakes summit is expected to cover a wide range of contentious topics, including trade, technology, export controls, Taiwan, and the Iran war.

items.title: Cisco's stock pops 17% on surging AI orders, as company says it's cutting almost 4,000 jobs
items.summary: Cisco's AI story has finally started resonating with Wall Street, with the stock hitting a record late last year and continuing to rally in 2026.

items.title: Kevin Warsh wins Senate confirmation as the next Federal Reserve chair
items.summary: In the most divisive vote ever for a Fed chair, Warsh, 56, won confirmation to take over for Jerome Powell.

items.title: This low-profile stock in the semiconductor supply chain has doubled this year. Wall Street still loves it
items.summary: Across the board, Wall Street analysts are bullish on Qnity Electronics and have raised their price targets on the stock.

items.title: Japan’s 30-Year Bond Sale Draws Firmer Demand on Higher Yields
items.summary: Japan’s 30-year government bond auction Thursday saw slightly stronger demand than the 12-month average as higher yields underpinned buying.

items.title: Stocks Waver as Trump Meets With Xi, Bonds Gain: Markets Wrap
items.summary: Asian equities swung between small gains and losses as the US and China held their summit, with traders looking to the meeting for clues on the trajectory of trade ties between the world’s two largest economies.

items.title: Japan’s Eneos Buys Chevron Asia Oil Assets for $2.2 Billion
items.summary: Japanese refiner Eneos Holdings Inc. agreed to purchase some of Chevron Corp.’s refining and retail assets across the Asia-Pacific for $2.17 billion, significantly expanding its footprint across the region.

items.title: Bagmane REIT Rises in Debut Following $360 Million India IPO
items.summary: Blackstone Inc.-backed Bagmane Prime Office REIT rose on its trading debut on Thursday after raising $360 million in an initial public offering.

items.title: Why the ECB’s June Interest-Rate Hike Is Becoming Less Certain
